w:document.mc:Ignorable: w14 w15 w16se w16cid w16 w16cex w16sdtdh w16sdtfl w16du wp14

w:r.w:t: Equivalence Partitioning (EP) & Boundary Value Analysis (BVA) Coverage
EP = Equivalence Partitioning | BVA = Boundary Value Analysis | PASS = Executed & Passed | — = Newly Added (Not Yet Executed)
User is logged in as Author.
2. Fill: Title = "AI Solution", AcademicYearId = 1, CategoryId = 2, File = "tailieu.pdf", CoAuthorIds = [2, 3].
System saves the initiative successfully and redirects to My Initiatives page.
User is logged in as Author.
2. Leave Title blank, fill other fields.
Validation error: "The Title field is required." Initiative is not saved.
User is logged in as Author.
2. Fill Title, do NOT select Academic Year.
Submit button is disabled or server rejects with validation error "Please select an Academic Year."
User is logged in as Author.
Validation error: "Invalid file format, only (.pdf, .docx, …) allowed." File is rejected.
User is logged in as Author.
2. Fill valid data, attach File = "video.mp4" (50 MB).
Validation error: "File size exceeds the allowed limit (10 MB)." Submission blocked.
Create Initiative — File Size at Boundary
User is logged in as Author.
2. Fill valid data, attach a file exactly 10 MB.
File is accepted and initiative is created successfully.
Create Initiative — File Size Just Below Limit
User is logged in as Author.
2. Fill valid data, attach a file of 9.99 MB.
File is accepted and initiative is created successfully.
Create Initiative — File Size Just Above Limit
User is logged in as Author.
2. Fill valid data, attach a file of 10.01 MB.
Validation error: "File size exceeds the allowed limit (10 MB)."
Create Initiative — Title at Min Length
User is logged in as Author.
Initiative is created successfully with single-character title.
Create Initiative — Title at Max Length
User is logged in as Author.
2. Enter Title with maximum allowed characters (e.g., 255 chars).
Initiative is created successfully. Title is stored and displayed correctly.
Create Initiative — Title Exceeds Max Length
User is logged in as Author.
Validation error or title is truncated. Initiative is not saved with oversized title.
User is logged in as Author.
2. Fill Title, Academic Year, Category. Do NOT attach file.
Initiative is created successfully without attachment.
User is logged in as Author.
2. Fill Title, select Academic Year. Do NOT select Category.
User is logged in as Author.
2. Fill all required fields, set Budget = 0.
User is logged in as Author.
Validation error: "Budget must be a non-negative number."
Evidence Screenshot — My Initiatives / Activity History Page:
Initiative list is displayed showing all author's initiatives with Title, Category, Created Date, Status, and Actions columns. Showing 1-10 of 17 entries.
Only initiatives from the selected academic year are displayed.
Only initiatives from the selected period are displayed.
Only initiatives with the selected category are displayed.
Only initiatives with "Rejected" status are displayed.
Only initiatives with "AI" in their title are shown.
No results displayed. Table shows empty or "No data available" message.
All filters are cleared. Full initiative list is displayed.
Page 2 displays entries 11-17. Pagination updates correctly.
All 17 initiatives are displayed on single page.
2. Click edit icon on a "Draft" initiative.
Initiative edit form is opened. Author can modify fields and re-submit.
2. Click view icon on any initiative.
Initiative detail page is displayed with full information.
Evidence Screenshot — Innovation Metrics / Statistics Page:
Statistics page displays: Total Initiatives = 17, Approved (this month) = 0, Pending Approval = 1, This Month = 7.
Pie chart and list show correct distribution: Software Initiative 5 (29.4%), Hardware/IoT 4 (23.5%), etc.
Recent initiatives are listed with Title, Time, Status, and Actions. Correct statuses shown (Processing, Draft, Revision_Required, etc.).
Statistics and charts update to show only data for "Processing" status.
Statistics update to show only Software
Statistics update to show only data from the selected year.
2. Set From Date and To Date.
Statistics update to show only data within the date range.
Filter with From Date > To Date
Validation error or no results returned. System handles gracefully.
Report file is downloaded containing author's initiative statistics.
Evidence Screenshot — Author Settings / Profile Page:
User is logged in as Author (MSc. Peter Lee).
1. Navigate to Settings > Personal Information > Edit.
2. Set FullName = "Nguyen Van A", Position = "Lecturer", Degree = "Master".
Profile is updated successfully. Notification: "Update successful."
User is logged in as Author.
1. Navigate to Settings > Personal Information > Edit.
Validation error: "Full name is required." Database state unchanged.
Update Profile — FullName with Special Characters
User is logged in as Author.
Profile is updated. Special characters are stored and displayed correctly.
User is logged in as Author.
Profile is updated successfully or shows max-length validation error.
Status changes to Faculty_Approved. System notification: "Initiative accepted…"
Status changes to Revision_Required. System records revision request and notifies author.
Review — Request Revision with Blank Comment
If comment is required: validation error. If optional: revision request is submitted.
Status changes to Faculty_Approved. Comment is stored as empty.
Validation error if comment is required for rejection, else status changes to Rejected.
2. Enter comment with maximum allowed characters.
Comment is accepted and stored. Status changes to Faculty_Approved.
2. Enter search string "AI Solution" in search bar.
List displays only initiatives matching "AI Solution."
Initiative list and statistics charts update to show only data for the selected year/period.
Browser downloads CSV file "Initiative_Stats_ddMMyyyy.csv" with correct faculty data.
System converts docx to PDF via LibreOffice and opens in browser PDF viewer.
All initiatives are displayed (no filter applied).
No results found. Appropriate "No results" message displayed.
No results or safe handling. No database error or crash.
Evidence Screenshot — Faculty Profile Edit Page:
Faculty user (Prof. Michael Brown) logged in.
2. Set FullName = "Dr. Le B", Email = "leb@truong.edu.vn", Phone = "0901234567".
Validation error: "Phone number must be 10-11 digits."
Evidence Screenshot — Council Assigned Initiatives Page:
Error message: "Incorrect password." Login is denied.
Redirected to Council Dashboard. Dashboard shows Total Assigned = 1, Completed = 0, Pending = 1.
User is logged in as Author.
Access denied (403) or redirected to home/login page.
Error: "Incorrect username or password." No security breach.
Evidence Screenshot — Council Evaluation History Page:
Assigned initiatives list is displayed, sorted by deadline. Shows SK2025-004 "Automatic Grading Software."
Message: "No evaluation history found. Complete your first initiative to see it here!"
All assigned initiatives are displayed regardless of status.
Only completed initiatives are displayed. If none, appropriate empty message shown.
All assigned initiatives are displayed (no filter).
Redirected to Login page. [Authorize(Roles="SciTech,Admin")] is enforced.
Redirected to SciTech Dashboard. Shows: Total = 52 initiatives, 6 Open Periods, Faculty Approved = 4, Evaluating = 4.
Access SciTech Page with Author Role
User is logged in as Author.
Access denied (403) or redirected to home page.
URL updates to status=Evaluating. List shows only "Evaluating" initiatives.
Filter by Date Range — Today Only
Validation error or empty results returned.
All initiatives regardless of status are displayed.
All initiatives are displayed (no keyword filter).
System handles gracefully — no crash. Returns empty result or truncates input.
File "BaoCaoHoSo.xlsx" is downloaded. Contains all 52 initiatives with columns: Code, Title, Creator, Status, etc.
File "BaoCaoHoSo.pdf" is downloaded. Content is well-formatted with complete initiative list.
Exported file contains only initiatives with "Evaluating" status.
Evidence Screenshots — Port Approve & Evaluation Results:
Status updates to Evaluating. Council members and scoring template are auto-assigned.
Status updates to Rejected. User is notified via RevisionRequest log.
Status remains Evaluating or Re_Evaluating. CurrentRound incremented to 2.
Status updates to Processing. Final report is generated.
Author names are hidden in evaluation view and PDF export.
Initiative is accepted successfully even without notes.
Validation error if notes are required, or rejection proceeds with empty notes.
Evidence Screenshots — Academic Year & Period Management:
Period is created and linked to the correct Academic Year.
Create Period with Invalid Date Range
Validation error: "End date must be after Start date."
1. Create period with StartDate in the past, EndDate in the future.
Period is created. Badge shows "Open" on dashboard.
1. Create period with StartDate in the future.
New period created with all categories
Validation error or period created with 1-day duration.
Academic Year is created and appears in the list.
Category list is displayed with columns: Category Name, Assigned Board, Scoring Template, Actions.
3. Enter category name, assign board and template.
Category is created and appears in the list with correct Assigned Board and Scoring Template.
Category "Software Initiative" exists in current period.
Validation error: "Category already exists in this period."
All categories from the source period are cloned into the current period with their assigned boards and templates.
Category exists in the selected period.
2. Click delete icon (red trash) next to a category.
Category is removed from the list.
2. Click view icon (eye) next to a category.
Category detail page is displayed showing assigned board members, scoring template, and linked initiatives.
2. Click edit icon next to a category.
Category is updated with new Assigned Board. Change is reflected in the list.
1. Click edit icon next to a category.
Category is updated with new Scoring Template.
2. Change Period dropdown from one period to another.
Category list updates to show categories for the newly selected period.
Template is created with status Inactive by default.
System accepts values ≥ 0. Values above 100 allowed for complex rubrics.
Template status changes to Active. Can be linked to Categories.
Validation error or template created (if duplicates allowed).
Validation error: "Total weight exceeds 100%." Or system allows flexible weights.
Criteria is added with 0% weight (valid edge case).
Validation error: "Max score must be non-negative."
Template is deleted. Removed from template list.
User is created and assigned correct ASP.NET Identity Role.
User status changes to Inactive. User can no longer log in.
Excel file downloaded containing only Council users.
User status changes to Active. User can log in again.
Only users with "Peter" in their name are displayed.
Users with "council" in their name or email are displayed.
Filter Users by Role and Status
Only active Lecturer users are displayed.
Council board is created and appears in the council list.
Member is added to the council. Role is correctly assigned.
2. Click delete icon next to a member.
Member is removed from the council board.
Council board is deleted and removed from the list.
Audit log is displayed with columns: User, Action, Table, ID, Timestamp, IP, Details.
Filter Audit Log by Action Type
Only logs for "MSc. Peter Lee" are displayed.
Page 2 displays entries 16-30. Pagination works correctly.
